title: PAID TIME OFF & VACATION
desc: Paid time off & vacation options that support a healthy work/life balance. That is why we offer a generous paid time off program that is made flexible based on your personal needs.

title: COMPREHENSIVE TRAINING
desc: We want to put our employees in the best position possible to succeed. That's why as an employee at Supermargins, we will provide on-the-job training and mentoring programs to help keep your career on track.

title: HEALTH INSURANCE
desc: We're invested in our associates' futures and one way we demonstrate that is by providing all regular full- and part-time associates' access to benefits to help them stay healthy - physically, mentally, and financially.

title: EMPLOYEE DISCOUNTS
desc: As an employee of Supermargins, you will be eligible to receive a very generous discount on all the products we carry.

title: 401K Plan
desc: Supermargins provides a retirement savings plan that allows you to save for your future while taking advantage of tax savings.
